message:
test(proptest): add 30 property tests for ntm_decommission module (ft-3681t.8.5)

Covers serde roundtrips (5), DependencyStatus invariants (2),
NtmComponentCategory/DocCategory labels (2), NtmDependency constructors (2),
DecommissionPhase gate pass rate arithmetic (2), DocumentationIndex coverage
rate and missing topics (3), ReversibilityPolicy window logic (2),
DecommissionPlan migration counters and readiness (2), snapshot consistency (1),
plus 7 standard factory unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
